title: Batch operations
subtitle: Apply one change across many sites at once — update announcements, branding, or channels for your whole fleet in a single action.
noSitesDesc: Provision or connect a site first.

actions.announcementDesc: Set the same announcement on every selected site
actions.channelCreateDesc: Inject the same upstream channel into each site
actions.channelToggleDesc: Enable / disable a channel by name across sites

announcementHint: Shown to end users on each site. Leave empty to clear.
brandingHint: Only the fields you fill are updated.
apiKeyHint: Sent over TLS, stored by each engine — never shown back.
channelToggleHint: Matches channels with this exact name on each site
